PrivacyViolationsSection.title: Why you need a CleanMyMac alternative
PrivacyViolationsSection.description: CleanMyMac is only one option to clean junk files from your device. For full privacy and a complete product suite, switch to Internxt fora full CleanMyMac alternative with Drive, Cleaner, and more.

titles: Your chats can be seen by X
Conversations are stored on X’s servers
descriptions: Grok may use chat inputs to train and refine its AI models, and some conversations may be reviewed by human staff, creating a risk that personal conversations may be seen by X employees.
Grok chats and metadata such as device information, language, and feedback are stored in your X account activity and retained by default for extended periods, limiting user control over data.
Because Grok is integrated with X, interactions may be linked to your public profile and expose personal interests or opinions, increasing risks such as harassment or reputational harm.

CleanMyMac only offers one core product, creating dependency on a single application for system cleanup and maintenance. If you need advanced protection for your device, monitoring, or cloud storage, you need to look elsewhere and possibly pay for more subscriptions.
Fake apps
There have been reports from security sites and CleanMyMac of unofficial websites offering pirated or cracked versions of the app with pre-installed malware. They often look legitimate but are used to trick you into stealing your information or harming your device. 
Risk of file loss
Because the tool has deep system access and powerful cleanup features, incorrect use can remove important system files or application components. Deleting the wrong files may cause apps to malfunction or the operating system to become unstable.

Internxt is fully open source and independently audited, so you can rest assured there are no backdoors to your data and that your information is handled transparently. Anyone can review the code for maximum trust and accountability.

Internxt offers Cleaner, and a full privacy ecosystem to give you everything you need to clear junk files from your device, store and share files with zero-knowledge encryption with Drive, and more benefits, including VPN, Meet, Mail, and more.

Get started with Internxt for just €1.60 a month, or avoid subscriptions with our affordable lifetime plans to pay once and use forever. With lifetime plans, you get access to the features of your plan forever, and you can upgrade to add more storage whenever you need.

inxtTable.title: Internxt: Total privacy, transparency, and trust

features.title: Open source
features.description: Internxt AI makes its code open for everyone to examine via GitHub, ensuring transparency and preventing hidden vulnerabilities.

features.title: Zero-knowledge Encryption
features.description: Your chats are encrypted on the client side, guaranteeing that only you can access them.

features.title: Based in Europe
features.description: Internxt is based in Spain and complies with GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001, and SOC 2, ensuring strict privacy protections.

features.title: Free and affordable plans
features.description: Internxt AI is free and can be combined with Internxt Drive lifetime plans up to 5TB. Access our services forever for {{percentage}}% off.

features.title: Proprietary software
features.description: Older versions of Grok were open source, but newer versions are proprietary, making it difficult to verify how data is handled or protected.

features.title: No end-to-end encryption
features.description: X retains encryption access, meaning chats could theoretically be accessed under legal or internal requests.

features.title: Chats stored in the US
features.description: Data stored in X’s cloud is subject to U.S. surveillance laws that may allow access under certain conditions.

features.title: Subscription based
features.description: Available with a free plan or premium access at €30/month.

WhyBestAlternativeSection.title: Why Internxt is the best alternative to Grok
WhyBestAlternativeSection.description: Internxt offers a comprehensive suite of products alongside its private AI to give you a secure Grok alternative.

descriptions: Internxt Drive offers secure, zero-knowledge and post-quantum encrypted cloud storage with advanced sharing, versioning, NAS, and rclone support.
Internxt Antivirus is built directly into your app to protect against malware, ransomware, and spyware with full or custom scans.
Internxt’s VPN encrypts your connection, blocks ads and trackers, and protects your identity while browsing online.
Internxt Cleaner helps you identify and remove junk or duplicate files to keep your storage organized and efficient.
Internxt Meet enables secure, private video calls protected with post-quantum encryption and free from trackers or ads.
Available on Windows, Mac, Linux, and mobile, with WebDAV, Rclone, and NAS support for advanced users.

freePlanCard.description: Use Internxt AI for free with private encrypted conversations

faq.question: Is Internxt a more secure and private alternative to CleanMyMac?
answer: Yes, Internxt uses post-quantum and zero-knowledge encryption that guarantees nobody but you can view your files.
Internxt Drive includes VPN, Antivirus, Cleaner, Meet, and Mail giving you more services than CleanMyMac to ensure you get the best security and privacy online.

faq.question: What is post-quantum encryption, and is it more secure?
answer: Unlike standard encryption, post-quantum encryption algorithms are built to resist powerful quantum attacks.
This cryptography method is used by Internxt to ensure that your lifetime cloud storage plan protects you against future cybersecurity threats and is available for all plans at no extra cost.

faq.question: Where is Internxt based?
answer: Internxt is based in Valencia, Spain, making it a GDPR compliant cloud storage solution that follows strict laws to ensure your data and privacy are protected.

faq.question: Is CleanMyMac more expensive than Internxt?
answer: With your exclusive 85% discount, all our plans are cheaper than CleanMyMac's pricing options currently available, with the benefit of offering many more features.

faq.question: How do I contact support?
answer: If you have any more questions, requests, or need assistance, you can contact hello@internxt.com and our Customer Success Team will be happy to help.

faq.question: Can I add more storage to my lifetime plan?
answer: Yes, you can upgrade your plan from the settings of your Internxt account if you need to add more storage. Or purchase a new plan at internxt.com/pricing with your current Internxt account, and your storage will be automatically stacked.

faq.question: Can I pay with credit card, PayPal, or cryptocurrency?
answer: Internxt currently accepts debit and credit cards (Mastercard, VISA, American Express, etc). You can also pay via PayPal, iDEAL, Sofort, Cryptocurrency, and Klarna.
